page_metadata.biotools__summary: BridgeDb is a framework for finding and mapping equivalent database identifiers. It has many facets: it is both a framework, live services, and are identifier mapping files for genes, proteins, and metabolites.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BridgeDb is a framework for finding and mapping equivalent database identifiers. It has many facets: it is both a framework, live services, and are identifier mapping files for genes, proteins, and metabolites.
